name: MacBook Air 13-inch (M3)
summary: Lightweight laptop for general academic and administrative workflows.
fullDescription: The 13-inch MacBook Air with M3 is ideal for highly mobile faculty and staff who need strong battery life, responsive performance, and reliable day-to-day productivity for office, meetings, and light creative work.
recommendedUseCases: Faculty and staff who travel frequently between campus locations
Office productivity, web apps, collaboration, and presentations
Users who prefer a macOS-first workflow
availabilityNotes: Typically stocked in standard configurations; custom memory/storage options may extend lead times by 2-4 weeks.

name: Dell Latitude 7450
summary: Business-class Windows laptop with durable design.
fullDescription: The Latitude 7450 is a dependable enterprise laptop for teams that need secure, manageable Windows systems with strong conferencing support and broad compatibility with institutional software.
recommendedUseCases: Department users on standard Windows software stacks
Daily use with docking and external monitors
notRecommendedFor: Specialized CAD workflows requiring workstation GPUs
Ultra-portable use cases where minimum weight is critical
availabilityNotes: Core configurations are generally available; procurement cycles may impact delivery windows during peak semester starts.
optionalUpgrades: Extended battery and USB-C dock bundle

name: Lenovo ThinkCentre M90t
summary: Tower desktop for office and shared lab workloads.
fullDescription: The ThinkCentre M90t offers desktop stability and easy serviceability for fixed workspaces, shared offices, and lab administration where expandability and wired connectivity are priorities.
recommendedUseCases: Shared staff offices and departmental labs
Multi-display desk setups with always-on power
Users needing easier hardware service and expansion
availabilityNotes: Usually available through enterprise channels; monitor and peripheral lead times can vary independently.

name: Dell UltraSharp U2724D
summary: 27-inch monitor suitable for productivity and content review.
fullDescription: A high-quality 27-inch productivity monitor with sharp QHD resolution and flexible connectivity for modern laptop and desktop workstations across Windows and macOS environments.
recommendedUseCases: Dual-monitor setups for admin and research staff
Teams needing consistent color for content review
notRecommendedFor: Color-critical studio work needing specialized reference displays
availabilityNotes: Commonly available with short lead time; bundled conferencing accessories may ship separately.

name: Logitech MX Keys S
summary: Quiet full-size keyboard for office and hybrid setups.
fullDescription: The MX Keys S is a premium full-size keyboard designed for comfort and reliability across multiple devices, making it a practical choice for users switching between desktops and laptops.
recommendedUseCases: Shared hybrid desks with multi-device pairing
notRecommendedFor: Mobile-only tablet usage without stable desk space
availabilityNotes: Generally available through peripheral stock; specific keyboard layouts may require special order.
